daily_summary.headline: Routine Launches and Minor Aurora Activity

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | Starlink Group 17-26
top_events.description: A routine launch of 25 Starlink satellites by SpaceX using Falcon 9 Block 5.
top_events.action: Watch live stream for booster landing.

top_events.title: HASTE | That's Not A Knife (DART AE)
top_events.description: Rocket Lab's suborbital test flight for a hypersonic vehicle developed by the US Department of Defense.
top_events.action: Follow updates for hypersonic vehicle tests.

top_events.title: Aurora Forecast
top_events.description: Minor aurora activity expected with a Kp index of 4.67, visible at high latitudes.
top_events.action: Check for aurora visibility if at high latitude.

opportunities.recommendation: Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
